prompt:
Goal: Create a richly detailed vintage watercolor travel poster for Dubai, blending old-world Arabian heritage with a futuristic skyline.

Canvas: Vertical poster, tall 2:3 travel-brochure composition on aged cream paper with visible watercolor texture, ink outlines, warm sunset lighting, and slightly worn postcard edges.

Main layout: The upper two-thirds is a grand street-and-creek scene viewed from a historic souk alley leading toward the water and the modern skyline. Place large hand-painted navy brush lettering “Dubai” at the top left. Under it add the serif tagline “WHERE DESERT MEETS SKYLINE” and a smaller cursive line “Where heritage rises into the future.” Add a vertical red Arabic calligraphy mark near the Burj Khalifa. At the top right place a circular black postal stamp reading “DUBAI · UAE” with a small dhow boat illustration and wavy postmark lines.

Main scene details: Show a lively old Dubai souk street with tan stone buildings, carved wind-tower architecture, wooden balconies, lanterns, flower-covered walls, and wet reflective cobblestones. In the center distance, Dubai Creek glows blue under a golden sunset, with small boats on the water and the Burj Khalifa rising dramatically in the skyline. Include the Burj Al Arab and other modern glass towers in the distance. Add birds in the sky and a United Arab Emirates flag on a boat canopy. On the right, include a palm tree and dense magenta bougainvillea cascading over the souk entrance. People wear traditional Gulf clothing: men in white kanduras and ghutras, women in black abayas, walking through the street.

Visible signs and text in the scene: Include exactly 4 prominent shop or location signs: 1) a large hanging sign on the left with Arabic text and “KARAK CHAI” plus a tea-cup icon, 2) a smaller black sign below it reading “KARAK CHAI” with a cup icon, 3) a right-side directional sign with Arabic text and “Gold Souk” plus a right arrow, 4) a gold shop sign in the lower strip with Arabic text and “GOLD.”

Foreground feature: At the lower left of the main scene, show a karak chai vendor stall made of dark wood. A vendor in white traditional clothing pours tea beside a brass kettle and a neat row of small tea glasses. The stall should feel warm, aromatic, and nostalgic.

Bottom travel-journal strip: The bottom third is separated like a scrapbook itinerary panel on aged paper. Include exactly 5 sections across this strip: 1) a left note card headed “Dubai” with the text “A city where every skyline tells two stories.” and exactly 4 illustrated bullet items: “Wind-tower heritage,” “Karak chai culture,” “Desert dunes nearby,” and “Futuristic skyline”; 2) a narrow framed watercolor vignette labeled “Dubai Creek,” showing a dhow boat at sunset; 3) a narrow framed vignette labeled “Gold Souk,” showing a glowing gold market alley; 4) a narrow framed vignette labeled “Downtown,” showing skyscrapers, Burj Khalifa, and fountains at night; 5) a right map panel showing the United Arab Emirates coastline with a red location pin and the handwritten label “Dubai.” Add the small uppercase text “UNITED ARAB EMIRATES,” a compass rose, the quote “Between sand and sky, Dubai dreams in gold.” and a small red stamp with Arabic text “دبي.”

Visual style: Romantic vintage travel illustration, watercolor and gouache, fine ink sketch details, warm ochre stone, turquoise creek water, navy lettering, gold sunset sky, magenta flowers, atmospheric perspective, dense but legible poster design.

Constraints: Keep all text hand-lettered but readable. Use the exact counted elements specified: 4 prominent shop/location signs, 5 bottom-strip sections, and 4 bullet items in the left note card. Do not add logos, watermarks, modern UI elements, or photorealistic rendering.
